purpose: slide-7 card toppers on the keynote (Canon / Goldens / The agent)
style: clean iconic square, warm hand-drawn comic, bold outline, cream #fbf5ec, orange #ff4201 accent, no text

cards.card-canon.png: a clean orange hardcover brand book with the AITX open-arms mark embossed on the cover + bookmark ribbon (the brand bible / source of truth). Replaced the earlier binder version.
cards.card-goldens.png: a framed on-brand print on an easel with a golden star seal (a blessed golden asset)
cards.card-agent.png: the AITX helper robot presenting a small glowing asset it made (ref: universe/reference/aitx-agent/gabr-aitx-agent.png)
